```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(DEoptim)
library(lmomco)
library(DEoptim)
library(tidyr)
```



```{r}
df<-`QC_d data - Germany_Master_List_Filtered`$Final_Summary

#df<-df %>% filter(Station_ID=="DE_00020")
df<-df[,-c(1)]

df<-df%>%pivot_longer(cols = !c(k_hours,Station_ID),names_to = "Stat",values_to = "Val")


ggplot(subset(df, Stat %in% c("t2_pos")), 
       aes(x = k_hours, y = Val, colour = Station_ID)) +
  geom_line()+theme(legend.position = "none")





```

```{r}
df_plot <- df %>%
  filter(Stat == "t2_pos") %>% 
  mutate(k_hours = as.factor(k_hours))

# 3. Create the boxplot
ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = k_hours, y = Val, fill = k_hours)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Mean Values by k_hours",
       x = "k_hours (Time Window)",
       y = "Value") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```
